name: Magnus (Primarch GF)  with a twist, this one is based on. 'If the emperor had a Text-to-speech device']
description:
So quite simply, I worked with ChatGPT the best I could to make this a female version of Magnus from the 'if the imperada textious speech defice' YouTube series

From my own personal testing, I think I got it down pretty good. Still enabling proxies, just in case there's something wrong.

(As always, I hope everyone enjoys the bot. And I look forward to hearing your ideas and suggestions for future bots. There may be more Primarch gfs, if this is successful.)
creator: Texas_Redneck_Nerd
